DOMAIN: customer_support
TASK: I acquired a restaurant chain (5 locations) that uses your platform for POS analytics, inventory management, and employee scheduling. The previous owner (deceased) set up the account with their personal email, personal credit card, and personal phone for 2FA. I have: (1) Probate court letters testamentary naming me executor of the estate, (2) Bill of sale for the business including 'all digital assets and service subscriptions', (3) Domain ownership proof (I now control the business website), (4) Business bank account authority letter. I do NOT have: the previous owner's email access (family says it was on a phone that's now wiped), any 2FA recovery codes, any knowledge of the account password. The platform currently has: 45 active employees depending on the scheduling system, $8K/month in recurring subscription charges hitting a credit card that will soon be cancelled by the estate, and 3 years of business analytics data I need for tax purposes. The estate lawyer wants to resolve this within 2 weeks. I need a defined process for this — your support documentation has nothing about business succession.
